name: zacatl-fastify-mongodb-backend
description: Fastify + MongoDB backend using Zacatl framework

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && npx tsc -p tsconfig.json && npx tsx ../../../../build-scripts-esm/build/fix-esm.js dist && npx tsx ../../../../scripts/build/rewrite-runtime-aliases.ts dist @sentzunhat/zacatl/ @sentzunhat/zacatl/
